name: Frozen Chocolate Mousse
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together the margarine and powdered sugar until well combined.
2. Gradually add in the cocoa powder and beat again until smooth.
3. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Stir in the vanilla extract.
5. Pour a layer of graham cracker crumbs into the bottom of an 8-inch square pan.
6. Spread the chocolate mixture evenly over the crumbs.
7. Top with additional crumbs.
8. Cover the pan and place it in the freezer to set for at least 2 hours, or until firm.
Cut into rectangles to serve.
